title: Used to
subtitle: Talk about past habits.
overview: A2 Bridge turns short A1 sentences into connected, useful English. Read aloud, understand the Chinese, then make your own sentence.

sections.title: A2 bridge focus
rows: I used to drink coffee every morning.
我过去每天早上喝咖啡。
I did not use to study English every day.
Did you use to live here?
No, I used to live in another city.
不是，我过去住在另一个城市。

items.en: I used to drink coffee every morning.
items.zh: 我过去每天早上喝咖啡。

items.en: I did not use to study English every day.
Did you use to live here?
No, I used to live in another city.
items.zh: 不是，我过去住在另一个城市。

items.en: This sentence helps me speak a little longer.
items.zh: 这个句子帮助我说得稍微长一点。

items.en: I can change the details and make it true for my life.
items.zh: 我可以改变细节，让它符合我的真实生活。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Did you use to live here?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: No, I used to live in another city.
lines.zh: 不是，我过去住在另一个城市。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you add one more detail?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I did not use to study English every day.

items.en: I used to drink coffee every morning.
items.zh: 我过去每天早上喝咖啡。

items.en: I did not use to study English every day.
Now say the same idea with your own real details.
items.zh: 现在用你自己的真实细节说同一个意思。

items.en: Repeat it until it feels clear and natural.
items.zh: 重复它，直到感觉清楚又自然。
